title: 2025-12-11 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 2.17
description: Daily pressure check for 2025-12-11: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 2.17/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-12-11, the score printed 2.17/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
